items.title: JOIN SELFCAST -  CASTING MADE EASY !!!

items.text:
skuespillere søges
Hej, vi er en gruppe unge fra filmskolen, Station Next, der er i gang med at producere en kortfilm, og vi søger derfor en dreng og en pige i alderen 15–19 år til frivillige skuespillerroller.

 

Vi leder efter nogen, der har lyst til at tage opgaven seriøst og engagere sig i projektet. Det er en fordel, hvis du har erfaring med skuespil, men det er ikke et krav, det vigtigste er, at du har mod på at prøve og lyst til at være med.

Optagelserne forventes at finde sted i Odder i weekenden den 28.–29. marts.

Hvis det lyder som noget for dig, eller en du kender, så send meget gerne en kort video til min mail, hvor du fortæller lidt om dig selv, f.eks. om du har erfaring med skuespil, og hvad du laver i din fritid.

Du kan kontakte mig her:

Mail: livalinneberg14@gmail.com

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
Hi,

I am offering a newly renovated, fully furnished, luxurious 1BHK for rent at Versova, Andheri West. The apartment is located on the 2nd floor of a 7-story building which is Sea Touch , situated directly opposite Love & Latte with a full sea view.

Key details:

- Bathrooms: 2

- Car Park - YES

- Pet Friendly: Yes

- Brokerage: None (Direct from owner)

- Possession: Immediate

- Availability: Open to all tenants

If you are interested, please reach out via WhatsApp at 9821456777 for more details.

items.text:
Casting call brief:
## looking for a truly diverse mix of walk-on supporting artists with some professional acting experience. Typical extra roles will include business colleagues and service staff. We would be expecting two smart outfit changes per person.

Shoot Dates - 31st March 2026 or 1st April 2026

Location - London

Compensation -

£275 per person, inclusive of all costs and buyout.

£75 Fitting day (if required) 

Casting Deadline - 12th March 2026, 5pm

Usage:

Worldwide, in perpetuity, across client-owned channels including websites, presentations, events, PR, organic social media and reasonable paid social promotion via the client’s own channels. Excludes broadcast, cinema, out-of-home and third-party advertising campaign.

Synopsis:

A cinematic film capturing the exciting development of a new professional business hub based abroad. Using green screen studio filming to capture actors exploring high spec CGI projected environments
## 
# **Submission Guidelines**

Please submit the following materials to [Olly@riverfilm.com](mailto:Olly@riverfilm.com) :

* Subject Line: RAK - Supporting Artist Call Out - [Your Name]
* Required Materials:
* Current Headshot and Full Body Photo (No selfies or filtered images, professional quality preferred)
* CV, clearly listing training and experience.
* Link to Showreel or relevant self-tape/performance clips if available (Vimeo or YouTube links preferred).
* Please confirm your availability during the Shoot Dates listed above.
* Agent/Management contact information (if applicable).

Note: We appreciate your interest and thank you for your submission. Due to the high volume of submissions, only those shortlisted will be contacted.

items.title: Casting call brief:

items.text:
CASTING CALL – “GIGI” – LONDON FILM SCHOOL GRADUATE SHORT FILM
Production: London Film School Graduate Film  

Title: GIGI  

Genre: Psychological Thriller  

Format: Graduate Short Film  

Contract: Student Equity Contract  

Pay: National Minimum Wage (5-hour half day)  

Location: London (pub location – exact address TBC)  

PROJECT DATES  

Shoot Date: 23 March 2026 

 

ABOUT THE FILM  

“GIGI” is a graduate short psychological thriller produced by London Film School.

ROLES:

1. TERRY – Pub Owner (Speaking Role)  

Male, 40–65 (playing age)  

Pub landlord energy. Warm but slightly guarded. Observant and grounded.  

Small speaking role (a few lines) in a pub scene.  

Rate: National Minimum Wage (5-hour half day)  

Contract: Student Equity Contract  

IMPORTANT INFORMATION  

• London-based applicants only (no travel/accommodation provided).  

• Half-day booking (5 consecutive hours).  

• Meals provided on set.  

• Fully insured student production.  

• Professional set environment.  

To Apply:  

Please send:  

– Headshot  

– Showreel (if available)  

– Confirmation of availability on 23 March  

Email: goldengirl.lfs@gmail.com

Subject line: “TERRY Submission” 

Thank you! 

We look forward to hearing from you.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - STUDENT COMEDY MINI-SERIES**

Hi! We’re looking to cast **four student actors** as the main ensemble of our upcoming comedy mini-series.

We are **graduating film students at MetFilm School London**, producing a **sitcom-style mini-series** about a struggling amateur band preparing to perform their **first live gig**.

The series centres around **miscommunication**. These musicians desperately want to be heard by the world - but struggle to hear each other.

**Meet the Band**

**ELLIOT - Lead Singer / Songwriter**
*A tortured artist; Elliot is a volatile mix of ego and insecurity.* Convinced he’s destined for greatness, he struggles with patience, collaboration, and attention. Underneath the drama is a sensitive musician desperate to be heard.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**JEFFERY - Bassist**
Cocky, outgoing, and the life of the party, Jeffery is always chasing the next thrill — girls, nights out, or anything exciting — which often makes him lose focus on the band. He must learn that being part of something bigger means staying focused and taking responsibility.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**ED (EDWARD) - Drummer**
Shy, lovable, and slightly in his own world, Ed plays music for connection rather than ambition. Honest and naive, he brings warmth to the group, but needs to learn that it’s okay to speak up for more than eight words at a time.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**MICHELLE - The Unappointed Manager**

Organised, witty, and outspoken, Michelle keeps the band in check. She lives with Elliot and Jeffery and is constantly dealing with their chaotic mistakes. Though she insists she’s only trying to keep things under control, she secretly enjoys managing the band’s dysfunction — and must eventually decide whether to step back or fully embrace the role she’s created for herself.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**Production Details**

• **Location:** London
• **Shoot:** 9-10 days in mid-April
• **Dates:** Within **14-26 April** (exact dates TBC)
• **Compensation:** Unpaid student production
• **Travel expenses covered**
• **Catering provided on set**

Throughout the series, the band faces a series of obstacles while trying to **book their first gig and finally perform live**, navigating ego clashes, poor communication, and the chaos of working together.

We’re looking for **energetic performers with strong comedic instincts** who enjoy collaborative student productions.

**For enquiries please contact:** srtmghfilm@gmail.com | +44 7392 408865 🎬

Sign up here to apply: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog)

items.text:
We are looking to cast two roles for an ad, we will be remote shooting so a good webcam is a must. 

The roles: 

1x Male Identifying character 

1x Female Identifying character

We are searching for a diverse cast and ideally both parties would have US Accents.

They will be playing two characters on a business call, arguing about a failed product launch. 

Please send a message and a link to your portfolio to studio@bullandwolf.com if you are interested. 

This is a paid gig and would be half a day of work.

items.text:
Cairo 📍egypt 🇪🇬
We are looking for talented artists to join our professional show group for performances in 5-star hotels, clubs, and discos.

Open Positions:

✔️ Female Dancers

 • Height from 165 cm

 • Strong dance or choreography background

✔️ Circus Artists female 

 • Different circus genres are welcome

Contract Period:

March – October

Rehearsals start: 12 March ( 7 days only )

⚠️ Good physical shape required.

The company provides:

✅ Round-trip flight tickets

✅ Timely salary payment

✅ 4 days off per month

✅ Comfortable accommodation (2 persons per room)

✅ Professional costumes

✅ Friendly international team

📩 For more details, contact us on WhatsApp:

+971583003423

items.text:
Hi Actors-

Our **FREE SELF-TAPE WORKSHOP** at The WholeHearted Actor💛 is this **Tuesday 3/10**.  Submit a self-tape and we'll review it live in our zoom classroom, and unpack everything from your technical set-up to your process and interpretation.  Whether you choose to send a tape or not - all are welcome.  It's so valuable getting watch and learn from fellow actor's audition tapes. 

SIGN UP HERE: 
[www.thewholeheartedactor.as.me/FREE-Self-TapeWorkshop](http://www.thewholeheartedactor.as.me/FREE-Self-TapeWorkshop)

items.title: Hi Actors-

items.text:
I dreamed for years about a real, live agent. But they don't really exist anymore! Tools exist that can do all of the separate functions of those semi-mythical agents of yesteryear. But writers want to write, not turn the crank on a cranky old, boring submission process with endless patience in pursuit of publication.
Then it dawned on me; aims could marshal those individual tools into an artificial, heartless, agent requiring only the most needful of interventions in order to do an agents job of paddling my talent and riding me ruthlessly to the glory of publication.
Once I looked into the idea it became clear that today's development systems could allow a focused team consisting of myself as lead and two programmers with appropriate app development experience could have a market-ready product in a few months with a large part of the time in obtaining training materials, tools, licenses and establishing an office. The time is NOW! GET ON BOARD THE LITERARY REVOLUTION 
Join in the gestation of the Heartless Agent!
Proportional equity for all doners.

🔥 The first teaser for "Achilles Returns" is here!

Watch the teaser now:

The legend is returning.

sharedPost.text:
🔥 MEET HASSAN/HANAN 🔥
The youngest baker in the tent… and possibly the boldest.

Playing age 17-18
Can be played as a Male or Female 
Hassan/Hanan is of Middle Eastern heritage, and we aim to cast the role authentically with a performer who reflects both the background and playing age.

A role that is fearless and full of fire. More confidence than experience, trusts their instincts over recipe books, and bakes like they’ve got something to prove. Under the cheeky swagger? A warm, heartfelt character determined to make their family proud (yes, the lucky T-shirt makes an appearance 👕✨).

Hassan/Hanan is the heart and soul of the younger bakers — comic, passionate, impulsive, and genuinely moving when it matters most.

🎭 Pre-audition workshops this Thursday – come along, meet the team, and get a feel for the show before audition day. 

📍The Temperance Institue, 65 London Street, Southport, PR9 0TH

Tickets on sale NOW! 🎟️

☎️ 07927 331 977 (Mon - Sat 10am to 7pm) with no fees!
 
💻 Alternatively you can book* 24/7 at www.ticketsource.co.uk/Southport-Spotlights *Booking fees apply

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'SOUTHPORT SPOTLIGHTS PRESENTS THE GREAT BRITISH BAKE OFF MUSICAL ၀ရ 5TH MARCH 7.30 TEMPERANCE INSTITUTE SOUTHPORT COULD COULD-YOUBEOUR HASSAN?'

sharedPost.text:
🔥 CASTING SPOTLIGHT: PHIL HOLLINGHURST 🔥 

Meet the tent’s ultimate alpha.

Phil Hollinghurst is swaggering, Scouse, confident and coolly composed. With piercing blue eyes, a motorbike parked somewhere offstage, and critiques sharper than a palette knife, he’s the judge every baker fears… and secretly wants to impress.

👀 Authoritative.
😏 Dry-witted.
⚖️ Fair… but fiercely strict.

Phil anchors the tension of the competition. His approval is hard-earned — and that’s exactly why it matters. Beneath the gruff exterior? A softer side that occasionally slips through when you least expect it.

This is a standout role for a performer who can command the stage with presence, charisma and razor-sharp timing.

🎭 Thinking of auditioning?
Join us at our Pre-Audition Rehearsals this Thursday — your chance to get a feel for the material, meet the team, and step into the tent with confidence.

📍The Temperance Institue, 65 London Street, Southport, PR9 0TH

Ready to earn his handshake? 🏍️✨

Tickets on sale NOW! 🎟️

☎️ 07927 331 977 (Mon - Sat 10am to 7pm) with no fees!
 
💻 Alternatively you can book* 24/7 at www.ticketsource.co.uk/Southport-Spotlights *Booking fees apply

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL (STUDENT PROJECT)

Hi everyone!  

Our names are Ellie, Ella and Hannah, and we are filming our final project for our TV and Radio production degree at the University of Salford in Salford & Bolton, the week commencing the 9th of March. Our short film ‘Clairvoyance’ is about a grieving sister who seeks the help of a psychic medium, despite disapproval from her mother and follows the two grieving women through their meeting with a psychic medium (Michelle) in an attempt to make contact with Tara’s brother (Adam).   

The role is Michelle, a scamming psychic medium who promises honesty yet preys on the fragility of grieving people. Her inability to connect with spirits hinders her business, but she continues through extensive research. 

MUST BE AVAILABLE ALL DAY WEDNESDAY THE 11TH OF MARCH AND AT LEAST ONE OF: MONDAY THE 9TH OF MARCH, TUESDAY THE 10TH OF MARCH AND THURSDAY THE 12TH OF MARCH. 

If you are interested, please email elliewhite@outlook.com for more information! If you have a showreel or a self tape, please attach it!

topComments.text: If you need any male roles, I'm 19 and about a half hour drive from Salford, would be happy to help.

"Hello!

I'm a professional videomaker with experience in creating high-quality video content for businesses, brands, and artists in California.

My services include:

- Video production for marketing, advertising, and social media
- Video editing and post-production
- 6K and HD filming
- Drone photography and videography
-We have high-end equipment ranging from Red Camera to Panasonic Lumix, and we handle both basic and highly relevant productions.

I understand the importance of creating engaging and effective video content that meets the needs of your business or brand.

If you're looking for a professional videomaker in California, I'm here to help!

Get in touch with me to discuss your project and how I can assist:

Marden Leão

Instagram : @mardeng

items.text:
**🚨HIRING IMMEDIATELY: Freelance Lighting & Sound Operator - UK Touring Show 🚨**

**Production:** The Forbidden Realm of Conspiracies: Uncovered - immersive theatre touring 33 theatres across May, Aug, Sep, Oct & November

**Location:** 33 UK theatres (exact venues provided to successful applicant)

**Dates:**
* **May:** 7 shows
* **August:** 1 show
* **September:** 10 shows
* **October:** 10 shows
* **November:** 6 shows

**Role Overview:**
We’re looking for a highly experienced lighting & sound operator to join our small touring team. You will:
* Design and program lighting at each venue for the show (using QLab, ETC, or similar systems).
* Operate live lighting, sound, and projections every performance.
* Assist with get‑in and get‑out at each venue.
* Take direction from the Company Stage Manager and the Producer/Director, executing cues precisely.

**Requirements:**
* Proven experience in lighting design, live sound operation, and projection management for professional theatre or live events.
* Ability to program shows from scratch at each venue.
* Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
* Ability to follow precise cues and operate under direction.
* Must be reliable, professional, and flexible for touring schedules.
* Driving license not required.

**Rates:**
* £190 per day (performance days)
* Rehearsals paid additionally at hourly rate - to be confirmed

**How to Apply:**
Send your CV, links to previous work, or showreel demonstrating experience with lighting, sound, and projection to: charlie.cajproductions@gmail.com
* Include “Lighting & Sound Operator Application” in the subject line.
* Applications will be considered immediately; priority given to those available for all dates & based in Liverpool

This is a rare opportunity to work on a highly creative, touring immersive theatre production. Only experienced professionals with full technical capabilities will be considered.

Profit share (travel and accommodation is not included) No experience necessary to apply. Must be based/from the North North-West West to apply'

Rehearsals will mostly be done independently •There will be TWO In person rehearsals before performance. •The in person rehearsals will take place on Saturday 8th August (all day) AND Friday 14th August 10am 5pm (show day) In person rehearsals will take place in Liverpool City Centre (TBC) All singers will receive songs and harmonies with enough time to prepare before the the show. We will also have check-ins to make sure you're happy with the songs and will offer support if needed.'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.

🌟 Ищем артистов на сезон в Турцию! 🇹🇷
Открыт набор танцевальных и цирковых коллективов, а также отдельных артистов для работы в 5⭐ отелях Турции на сезон.

Приглашаем:

• танцевальные шоу-балеты

• цирковые коллективы

• акробатов

• жонглёров

• воздушных гимнастов

• фаер-шоу

• артистов оригинального жанра

• отдельных цирковых артистов

Условия:

✔ выступления на сценах 5⭐ отелей

✔ контракт на сезон

✔ проживание и питание предоставляется

✔ выступления перед международной аудиторией

📩 Для участия отправляйте:

• видео выступления

• краткое описание номера / шоу

• состав команды

• контакты

Писать можно в Direct

items.text:
Casting Call - "CHECKMATE" - Ravensbourne University - DIRECTING MODULE - SHORT FILM
My name is Timothy Pena, a 2nd year student, and I am currently looking for 2 male actors for a short film, adapting from the Interrogation scene of The Dark Knight (2008). The actors should be ages 20 and up. If interested or know anyone who might be please let me know. My group and I are planning to film between the 16th-17th March.

ABOUT THE FILM 

Adapting a scene of The Dark Knight (2008) along with chess, Checkmate explores the psychological mind between a villain and a hero, and how justice is seen in the eyes of society, as a cruel joke or something sinister in its roots. 

ROLES

Meme: The antagonist (30). A psychological freak show with a bloody mouth when smiling and dons a mafia outfit who has the habits of being the mastermind in every crime scene. Often has a hobby with chess. His goal is to bring chaos to society in order to see just how humanity will fall from their sin.

Twilight: The protagonist (30), whose ideals in delivering justice to society is questioned by their interrogator. Wears a dark hood to conceal his name and identity. His goal is to find out Meme’s plans but question if his method is the right way, or if there is more than meets the eye.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION 

* Confirmation of Availability before 11th March 
* Rooms to be confirmed but were shooting at Ravensbourne University London
* Email: penat005.205@gmail.com and subject line "CHECKMATE SUBMISSION"
* Headshot and Showreel (if possible)

Thank You!

I'm looking forward to hearing back from You.

items.text:
Could you be our Frank Sinatra or Sammy Davis Jr?

The Brookside Theatre in Romford are staging THAT'S LIFE - The Rat Pack Musical this March and are looking for 2 talented singer/actors to take on these iconic roles

Please note that we are not looking for people that looks like Frank & Sammy but we are looking for performers that are prepared to study these stars to emulate them vocally and physically

This is a charity production offering a profit share with guarantee

Show runs w/c 30/03/2026

For more info please email casting@brooksidetheatre.com (please do not send any large files but links to showreels would be fantastic) 

#CastingCall #ratpack #franksinatra #SammyDavisJr

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING CALL COULD YOU BE OUR FRANK Male, age Male,age35-55 35-55 Strong vocals, Comic Timing Basic movement Rehearsals: March 2026 THATS HE ESWINGIN' NEW RAT PACK MUSICAL 1- APRIL BROOKSIDE THEATRE, ROMFORD O CASTING CASTING@BROOKSIDETHEATRE.COM'

May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING CALL COULD YOU BE OUR SAMMY Black Male, age 25-55 Strong vocals, Comic Timing Must be able to move Rehearsals: March 2026 THATS HFE THE SWINGIN' NEW THESWINGIN'NEW.RATPACKMUSICAL RAT PACK MUSICAL 1-5APRIL 1- BROOKSIDE THEATRE, ROMFORD 1 O CONTACT CASTING@BROOKSIDETHEATRE.COM CASTINGG'

Vi er et filmhold fra filmhøjskolen Potemkin i Aarhus og er i gang med at lave en kortfilm, som skal optages ved Hjerl Hede. Hertil har vi brug for statister til at medvirke i en retssagsscene anno 1721.

Lyder det som noget for dig? Så tøv ikke med at kontakte vores producer på:

marie.korsgaard.rasmussen@gmail.com

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

**CASTING CALL - Bristol based Puppet Student Short Film**

We are casting a supporting role of a **'Talk Show Host'** in our puppet musical short film! Think a bubbly, charismatic character whose professional could conduct their own interview on a late night talk show. 

Filming on the mornings of 16th and 17th March in Clevedon at the Curzon Cinema, role is Unpaid but all expenses inc food and travel covered.

Please email Tyler.beck@boomsatsuma.education if interested where we then send a short extract for a self tape - thanks so much!

items.text:
Open Call In Person Auditions Mon. & Tues. March 9 & 10 at 6pm for **9 to 5**, Music & Lyrics by Dolly Parton, Book by Patricia Resnick, Directed by Felisha Heng - Musical Director Chelsea Melnick, Choreographer Cassandra Reed. Performances: May 1-17; Fri. & Sat. 8pm & Sundays 2pm. Auditions @HeightsPlayers 26 Willow Place Brooklyn, NY 11201. (718) 237-2752.

 

Please prepare 32 bars of a musical theater song in the style of the show that best fits and showcases your range. Be creative! We are looking for engaging and energetic storytellers. Give your audition as much character (and camp!) as possible! Please bring a headshot and resume. An accompanist will be provided. Please bring clearly marked sheet music in the correct key and do not sing acapella. There will NOT be a dance call at auditions. Only those invited to callbacks will participate in a dance call.

 

We are seeking a diverse cast of performers for a range of roles. Performers of all genders are encouraged to audition for ALL roles, we are casting all roles without gender restrictions. BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ performers are strongly encouraged to audition.

 

NO pay.

 

**Character Breakdown:**

**Violet Newstead**: The company's Head Secretary and Mr. Hart's Administrative Assistant, she is a single mother and typically stands up for what she believes in. Attractive, strong, ambitious. Age 40 to 50

**Doralee Rhodes**: A young, sexy spitfire who works at Mr. Hart's office. She is proof that there is more to a woman than just her looks. Age: 20 to 30

**Judy Bernly**: The "new" girl at the firm, she has been burned by her husband's affair and is searching for personal empowerment. Insecure, determined, and hopeful. Age: 30 to 35

**Franklin Hart, JR.** : One of the firm's executives and a notorious chauvinist. He is capable of faking charm but usually shows his true colors as an arrogant, self-absorbed boss. Age: 45 to 50

**Roz Keith**: The attentive office gossip queen and snitch. She has an unrequited love for Mr. Hart and will do anything she can to win his approval. Age: 35 to 45

**Joe**: A handsome, young office accountant. Genuine and nice, and smitten with Violet. Age: 25 to 35

**Dwayne**: Doralee's attractive husband. He is very supportive of her professional pursuits. Age: 25 to 30

**Josh**: Violet's awkward teenage son. Age: 15 to 18

**Missy**: Franklin Hart's wife, clueless to her husband's true nature. Age: 20 to 35

**Maria**: A young and vibrant secretary in Hart's office. Age: 20 to 30

**Dick**: Judy's soon-to-be ex-husband. An average guy, he is sporting a little less hair and a little more paunch than he did ten years ago. Age: 35 to 45

**Kathy**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to gossip. Age: 30 to 40

**Margaret**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to drink. Age: 30 to 40

**Tinsworthy**: Franklin Hart's boss and Chairman of the Board. A good man, who may be wiser to Hart's ways than he lets on. Age: 50 to 65

**Ensemble**: Office employees, police officers, hospital employees.

[https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/](https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/)

items.text:
Last 10 places available! 

🎟 Tickets & info:
2 Day Casting Workshop in Tallinn, Estonia!

Discount:
Use code Actorslab for 29€ off.

Eeva Putro (actress and writer from Finland) shares:

"I participated in the Actors Lab in autumn 2025 and found it both inspiring and very useful. It was a great opportunity to work with actors from the Baltic countries and connect directly with casting directors from the region. The workshop created meaningful links between different markets and also offered a broader international perspective. The event was very well organised, the atmosphere supportive and focused, and each actor had enough time to work. I would warmly recommend it to actors interested in international collaboration and understanding the casting process beyond their own country."

items.text:
Calling all Sustainable Crafty Pros! 🍎♻️
Are you a Crafty professional who’s passionate about cutting down on single-use plastics and food waste on set?

Planet in Mind is looking for sustainable-minded Crafty vendors and experts to join our Sustainable Production Practices Showcase during LA Climate Week (April 8th–15th)!

We want to give you a platform (and a booth!) to show the industry how the Crafty table can be both delicious and eco-friendly. Whether you’ve mastered bulk-buying, compostable swap-outs, or zero-waste setups, we want you to be part of the conversation.

You’ll be alongside leaders from the Mayor’s Office of Energy & Sustainability, the Sustainable Entertainment Alliance, and the Green Film School Alliance as we show the industry "what happens when we get it right" - the theme of LA Climate Week.

Interested in hosting a booth or sharing your expertise?

Please reach out to me directly at: tauna@planetinmind.earth

Let’s make LA sets greener, one snack at a time! 🌿🎬

#LAClimateWeek #SustainableFilm #Crafty #GreenProduction #FilmCrewLA #PlanetInMind

items.text:
Casting call for the Indie Short HOTLINE 

TITLE: HOTLINE 

GENRE: Dark Comedy, Absurd 

LOGLINE: When a chaotic former phone sex operator and her too self-controlled coworker hide from an active shooter at their New Year’s Eve office party in a suicide hotline center, they must find a way to stay alive while helping callers do the same. 

ROLES: Need two actresses for both drama and comedy in a B&W short like ROMY & MICHELLE meets WAITING FOR GODOT in a tone similar to KINDS OF KINDNESS or VIRGIN SUICIDES.

SERENA: (Female, 40s, heart of a CEO but stuck in admin, Ali Wong type) Serena’s decisive, competent and moral but maybe a little repressed. Rapid fire dialogue with a light touch, screwball physical comedy, flashes of panic amid bold leadership. 

ROXANE: (Female, 30s, former phone sex operator, Merritt Wever, Jennifer Coolidge type) Roxane might seem naive and dress like a showgirl but she's also wise, sincere empathetic and earthy. Believably gullible, clueless, light touch, comedic timing.

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Very Normal Productions, LLC. Female director Chelsey Schmidt. Cinefemme is a fiscal sponsor. 

PRODUCTION TYPE: Indie, Student Film

TONE: Dark, absurdist, quirky, offbeat, playful, ironic, screwball, claustrophobic,

 

COMPENSATION: $400 stipend for two shooting days, one zoom table read and two half-day rehearsals tbd. Meals and snacks. Transportation set upon request.

RUN TIME: 15 minutes 

UNION: Non-union

SUBMISSIONS: Please send to verynormalprod@gmail.com by March 8, 2026. [Extended from March 1] We can't respond to all applicants, but will be contacting those selected with next steps. 

• Name and contact info

• Headshot or recent photo

• Resume 

• Reel or self tape dark comedy scene/monologue

• Subject line: HOTLINE CASTING - [your name and role]

• Availability weekends in May and June if unavailable May 16, 17

SHOOTING SCHEDULE: Full weekend in May (16, 17)

FILMING LOCATION: Denver/Boulder area, all locations indoors

TW: suicide and active shooter, sexual situations (dialogue only)

Thank you!

items.text:
**ATTENTION ACTORS/READERS!!**

Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole are doing a virtual table read for Emily's feature film script "Marshlights" on Sunday, March 15th from 2-5pm and are in need of actors to read the roles. Emily is seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future. 

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately. 

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis. 

**The narration role and the role of Mrs. Ashford have already been cast.**

Marshlights Table Read

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: Sunday, March 15th @ 2-5pm

WHO: Written by Emily Stephens, Casting by Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole

PROJECT NAME: Marshlights (91 pages)

SUMMARY: The revelation of a young trans woman in a small post-reconstruction town in South Carolina causes confusion and ultimately a showdown with local white supremacist theology leading to a violent reckoning.

CHARACTERS:

 

**Luke/Lucy** (white/early 20s, trans actors are encouraged to submit):  a trans woman who is the child of an aristocratic line, her father a Colonel from the civil war. She's curious, and (post-transition) lively even flirtatious.

**Mark** (black/mid 20s): a constant servant for Lucy and her family. He is deeply loyal and kind. He accepts Lucy's transition and does his best to protect her.

**Esau **(white/early 20s): Lucy's best friend and son of the local pastor. Esau wrestles endlessly with Luke/Lucy who he loves and the expectations and fragility of his own masculinity.

**Pastor Green** (white/late 40s): a deeply patriarchal true believer of a white supremacist theology that grants the town his version of order.

**Colonel Ashford** (white/late 50s): former civil war Colonel and very rigid man with a distinct conception of masculinity defined through labor and sweat.

**Mahala** (black/late 50s): former slave and a major part of the black community. Honest and powerful keeper of community memory and folklore.

**Amos**(black/30s): a seminary trainee black preacher who acts as the less folkloric spiritual leader. Hard working to support his community and it's elders.

**Mrs. Prioleau**(black/40s): keeper of community after Mahala's death. Focused on keeping her community safe.

**Saint Lucia** (mythic): the literal embodiment of the saint appears to help Lucy be revealed. She is disconnected from time.

There are number of smaller or unnamed characters for small scenes, the readers of Saint Lucia and Mrs. Prioleau will cover those roles. 

SUBMIT TO: marybetheversole@gmail.com with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. 

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. **

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

items.text:
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 
Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

items.text:
Hi! We're looking for expressive people for a paid remote acting project with Canopy Labs 🎬

💰 £40/hour or £100 for ~2.5 hours total (20-30 min director call + two 60-min recorded video chats)

No scripts — just natural, guided conversation with another actor over video call. Your likeness won't be replicated; footage is purely for AI research.

You'll need:

•⁠  ⁠A smartphone + portrait orientation

•⁠  ⁠Good WiFi + 5GB free storage

•⁠  ⁠Plain background, simple clothing, quiet space

To apply, email amy@canopylabs.ai with your phone number and a quick 10-second portrait video introducing yourself (torso and hands in frame).

We're starting very soon so do get in touch asap if you're interested.

items.text:
🎬 GREAT SCREEN ACTING ISN’T JUST ABOUT SHOWING EMOTION —

IT’S ABOUT GENERATING THE RIGHT ONE, TRUTHFULLY.

In this Masterclass, I take you inside and explore the directors process for working with actors for film and television.

Scripts are not instructions — they are blueprints, layered with meaning, intention and emotional truth that often sits well beneath the surface, and you must be able to read those hidden levels to respond to what the story truly requires.

As a director, I understand how to shape emotional flow across a scene and guide an actor to exactly what the story needs. 

As a screenwriter, I know how to infer the hidden emotional layers beneath the dialogue.

As an actor, you must use your own experience and perception to inhabit the character’s world fully then play your own internal emotional landscape — with timing, control and sensitivity — in tune with the story.

Then you your work becomes truthful, compelling and eminently castable.

This class will explore all of the above subjects and is open to anyone who is interested. 

📅 **Date & Time**
Wednesday 25th March 2026
7.30pm – 9.00pm UK Time 

🧾 **How to Book**
For all details including how to reserve your place-go to:
https://screen-acting.com/masterclass

And if you have any questions, just pop them in the comments.

Wir spielen 10 Vorstellungen in ganz Bayern und besetzen aktuell die Rolle des Bischofs 

Gesucht wird:

Bischof

items.text:
Servus zusammen 🙂

ich möchte euch einen kleinen Einblick in ein freies Filmprojekt geben, das überwiegend mit **engagierten Komparsen und Laiendarstellern** entstanden ist.

Viele, die sonst im Hintergrund stehen, haben hier größere Rollen übernommen — und genau das macht für mich den Reiz solcher Projekte aus. Mit wenig Budget, viel Improvisation und echter Spielfreude ist ein Film entstanden, der vor allem vom Teamgeist lebt.

Ein großes Dankeschön an alle Mitwirkenden — ohne euch gäbe es solche Projekte nicht.

Wer mag, kann gerne mal reinschauen 🙂

Wir sind auf YouTube. „Familie Brandl Comedy“ hier der Link.
👉 https://youtu.be/ndAtSQOVREY?si=9vq-k4j9bFdRwume

**EMERGENCY CASTING CALL! SHORT FILM LEAD ACTOR WANTED!**

Our previous actor dropped out so we are urgently searching for a lead actor for our upcoming short film, 'Stages'.

'Stages' follows Francis, who goes to therapy to deal with his recent divorce, spiralling backwards through the stages of grief before he is forced to confront the reality of his denial.

**Genre:** drama, psychological

**CASTING Brief details:**
* Adult male, **late 20s - 50s**
* Filming based **Portsmouth **
* **£150** wage or for travel expense coverage (can be stretched to £200 if travel expenses require)

**REHEARSAL DATES** (not necessary to attend but would be ideal):
* **Thursday 12th March**
* **Friday 13th March**

**SHOOT DATES** (unmovable, must attend, **12pm - 10pm**):
* **Monday 16th - Wednesday 18th**
* Another date in April TBC

Please email **rishchakraborty@gmail.com **if interested!!!

**Deadline: **Tuesday 10th March

sharedPost.text:
Let’s be honest.

Running a dance or performing arts school can feel overwhelming.

Exam seasons are stressful.
Admin piles up.
Income can feel unpredictable.
And sometimes, it feels like you’re doing it all alone.

That’s exactly why GPEC was created.

Not to be the biggest association.
Not to compete on prestige.
But to make teachers’ lives easier.

We built GPEC so you can:

✔ Run structured, organised exams without unnecessary stress
✔ Offer a wide range of syllabuses your students actually want to take
✔ Add classes that increase your revenue
✔ Choose what’s relevant to your school — and leave out what isn’t
✔ Access online and in-person exams and competitions
✔ Have everything under one roof

But most importantly?

So you feel supported.

We’re a small association on purpose.

That means you can ask questions.
You can ask advice.
You can talk to real people who understand studio life.

Because teaching shouldn’t mean constant financial pressure.
And building a studio shouldn’t cost you your peace of mind.

If you’re looking for an association that helps you grow, earn, and feel backed — not boxed in — message me.

Let’s build something sustainable.

items.text:
NOW ACCEPTING ALL SIGN UPS!
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 

Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: YOUNG ELLE
Short Film: Duet

We are currently casting the role of Young Elle for the upcoming short film Duet.

Role

Young Elle

Female

Approximately ages 5 to 7

Young Elle appears in a single memory sequence that reflects the warmth of her relationship with her father before the events of the film unfold. We are looking for a natural and expressive young performer who can bring sincerity and warmth to the role.

Project Details

Independent short film

Non union

Filming in the Denver area

One day of shooting

To Submit

Please send:

Headshot or recent photo

Age and location

Any acting clips if available

Parent or guardian contact information

Submissions can be sent to:

eric@pergafilms.com

Selected applicants will be contacted to audition.

Thank you and we look forward to meeting some wonderful young performers.

sharedPost.text:
Some of the wonderful feedback I’ve been receiving from my adult classes! 🥰🙌 Means a lot to know that they feel supported, comfortable and encouraged in my sessions. 

Knowing that my group can leave their hang-ups at the door, get more active and experience the JOY of dance means the world!

If you’d like to find out what the classes can do for you, drop me a message! 

Monday 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3, usually £6)

Thursday 7pm - 8pm (First session FREE!! Usually £6)

#dancemore #positivefeedback #FeelGoodFitness #liverpoollife #scousescene #trysomethingnew #halfprice #FreeClass #MoveMoreFeelBetter #mentalhealthmatters #mentalhealthawareness

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM
📍 Grand Rapids, Michigan

KingsVisuals Productions is casting for a faith-based supernatural thriller short film titled “The Price of Power.”

!All races are invited and welcome!

We are currently looking for strong actors for several main roles.
Filming will take place in the Grand Rapids area and is scheduled for Summer 2026.

 IMPORTANT

This is a non-paid project, but actors will receive:
• On-screen film credit
• Professional footage for your reel
• Meals / catering on set
• Transportation support if you live within 30 minutes of Grand Rapids
• Opportunity to work on a high-quality cinematic project
This is a great opportunity for actors who want to build their portfolio, reel, or IMDb credits.

ROLES WE ARE CASTING

GLORIA (Lead Role)
Female | Age 9–12
A strong and intelligent child who carries a mysterious spiritual authority. She must balance innocence with quiet strength.
(Parent/guardian required on set.)

MICHAEL (Lead Role)
Male | Age 25–35
A struggling but compassionate man who unexpectedly becomes Gloria’s protector. Honest, grounded, and emotionally expressive.

NATAS (Main Villain)
Male | Age 30–50
Charismatic yet intimidating supernatural antagonist. Calm, manipulative, and powerful presence.

PASTOR JOHN
Male | Age 35–60
A pastor under financial pressure who becomes tempted by supernatural power. A complex character with a strong emotional arc.

PASTOR SAMUEL
Male | Age 45–75
A wise and spiritually grounded former pastor who understands the ancient covenant behind the rings.

 HOW TO SUBMIT
Please send:
• Your name
• Age
• Headshot or recent photo
• Acting experience (if any)
• Demo reel (optional but preferred)
• Your location
Send submissions to:
📧 Kingsideview@gmail.com

We are building a passionate team for this project and looking for actors who want to be part of something meaningful and cinematic.
Please share this post with actors who may be interested.
🎥 KingsVisuals Productions

items.text:
# Are you a mother who wants to be in front of the camera, a babysitter who knows what kids like, or even somebody that simply has a warm energy and loves kids/babies? 

Orca Live Studios is looking for hosts for the brand Tonies, a toy company that has sold over **134 million Tonies** (physical figures) and more than **10 million **Tonieboxes since their launch in 2014.

This is an in-studio role where you will be the face of the brand, hosting Tonie's livestreams off their brand accounts (80k+ followers) 1-2 times a week. You will be able to gain on camera/hosting experience as well as build a following for yourself, all while having fun. If you're comfortable in front of the camera, come join us!

Rate: $35/hr + Opportunity for commission (rate increase available based on performance) 

*This is an in-studio role in Culver City, Los Angeles*

If you are interested and feel like you'd be a great fit, please message me your email and socials - IG and/or Tiktok 

orcashop.co

items.text:
🎬 **AUDITION CALL — PAID FILM ROLE**  
Holywood Studios U.S. is casting **one male and one female actor**, both in their early 30s, for a **featured scene** in an upcoming faith-centered film.

📍 **Location:** Filming will take place **under the iconic tree at Holywood Studios** in Harriman, TN.
📅 **Date:** Approximately **one month from now** (exact date will be will confirmed soon after Auditions).
💰 **Compensation:** Paid role 

👗 **Wardrobe: **will be provided
* **Male:** Wedding tuxedo (provided or approved)
* **Female:** Wedding dress (provided or approved)

🎥 This is a **cinematic, emotionally rich scene** with strong visual storytelling. Some dialogue required, but expressive presence is key.

We’re looking for actors and actresses who can embody **grace, depth, and authenticity** in a moment that reflects love, commitment, and spiritual beauty.

📩 **To audition, please send your headshot, resume, and availability to:**  
📧 [auditions@holywoodstudios.us]

**Holywood Studios U.S.**  
Executive Director: BillyBow Aguirre, Executive Director of Holywood Studios U.S.
Faith. Film. Legacy.

items.text:
Blink Films is making a documentary for BBC Arts about important books in people's lives, and we would like to hear from you!

Did a single book completely transform your life?

Did reading it inspire you to make a huge change?

Did it encourage you to leave the rat race and pursue something totally different?

Or was reading a challenge that once conquered, inspired you to do something remarkable?

If so, we'd love to hear your stories! 

Please email us at: Reading@blinkfilmsuk.com. Tell us your story and tell us what the book was, what it inspired you to do or change in your life, why it proved so monumental and a contact number!

(Deadline 18th March 2026)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Hauptdarstellerinnen gesucht
Psychologisches Drama / Liebesdrama  

📍 Drehort: Stuttgart  

🎥 Produktion: TT Films  

📺 Veröffentlichung: YouTube & weitere Plattformen  

Für unseren neuen intensiven Kurzfilm suchen wir zwei Hauptdarstellerinnen:

✨ LINA (25–30)  

Warm. Emotional offen.  

Augen voller Vertrauen – und Verletzlichkeit.  

Sie liebt tief und ehrlich. Ihre Stärke ist ihre Sanftheit.

✨ SOPHIA (25–30)  

Elegant. Mysteriös. Provozierend.  

Augen wie ein Rätsel.  

Selbstbewusst, kontrolliert – mit einer dunklen Tiefe.

🎭 Genre: Psychologisches Drama / Liebesdrama  

Eine Geschichte über Leidenschaft, emotionale Zerrissenheit und psychische Spannung.

ℹ️ Wichtige Infos:  

– Es handelt sich um ein Hobby-/Independent-Projekt  

– Leider keine Gage  

– Der fertige Film kann für euer Portfolio/Showreel genutzt werden  

– Verpflegung am Set ist organisiert  

– Dreh in Stuttgart – Bewerberinnen aus der Nähe bevorzugt  

🎬 Was wir suchen:  

– Ausdrucksstarke Mimik  

– Natürliches, intensives Spiel  

– Zuverlässigkeit & Leidenschaft für Film  

📩 Bewerbung mit:  

– 2–3 aktuelle Fotos  

– Kurze Vorstellung (Name, Alter, Wohnort)  

– Optional: Showreel  

DM oder E-Mail: tt.films@hotmail.com

items.text:
Hallo liebe Filmfreunde
Ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und gehe diesen Herbst an die Lazi Filmakademie in Esslingen. Hat jemand schon Erfahrungen mit dieser Schule gemacht, oder geht evt aktuell dorthin und weiß wir das dort mit WG funktioniert. Würde mich mega freuen wenn ihr mich anschreiben würdet und man mal privat reden könnte.

On the occasion of 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻’𝘀 𝗗𝗮𝘆,
​
we are offering a 𝗱𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘄𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻 — a reminder that strength and softness can coexist, and that the body deserves to be listened to, not overridden.
​
𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻
120 minutes of focused abdominal and nervous system work.
Includes an initial anamnesis.
​
🌿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-fur-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.

Hallo zusammen,

**Schauspieler sucht Kurzfilm- / Studentenfilmprojekte im Raum Augsburg/München und vergleichbar**

ich bin Schauspieler aus dem Raum Augsburg/München und auf der Suche nach ernsthaften
Kurzfilm-, Studenten- oder Abschlussfilmproduktionen mit künstlerischem Anspruch.
Interesse besteht vor allem an

**Hauptrollen oder tragenden Nebenrollen** 

in Projekten mit Festivalziel oder professionellem Produktionsniveau. Theatererfahrung vorhanden, zuverlässig bei Proben und Dreharbeiten. Ein Showreel ist im Aufbau, Material kann auf Anfrage gesendet werden. Auch oﬀen für 

**Zusammenarbeit mit Regie- oder Produktionsteams an eigenen oder neuen Kurzfilmprojekten**.

Herzliche Grüße,
Thorin Kiel

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

Those auditioning will be provided with sides to read. We'll try different character types and situations with each person.

items.text:
CASTING CALL! New LIFE OF CHRIST show with The Lantern Marquee, Performing May 25-30! Auditions (video submission) due Thurs 3/12, callbacks 3/14.
Why you want to be part of it:

🪨Performing as a themed dinner theatre at Provo's historic castle amphitheater, covered in lanterns!

🪨Music ONLY, no dialogue! Rehearsal schedule workable around your life. (required on-site dates: May 18-22; 25-30, evenings)

🪨Beautiful covers of 80's songs that have been carefully curated according to their spiritual analogues. (eg. "Who Wants to Live Forever," (cover by Il Volo) originally sung by Queen, is sung by Christ and the Disciples in our show. It’s amazing check it out:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RwKUxTMSs6M)

DM with questions!

Learn more and audition using this link:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1IhT-JZE7AEzRCOAyqVS8P0PN6daj9G_z?usp=sharing

**Poszukiwani aktorzy / statyści do filmu krótkometrażowego o tematyce psychologicznej.**

Zdjęcia będą realizowane w **Dąbrowie Górniczej**.

Projekt ma charakter **non-profit**, jednak daje możliwość zdobycia doświadczenia na planie filmowym oraz udziału w ciekawym projekcie artystycznym.

**Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego.**

Prosimy zainteresowane osoby o przesłanie:
* krótkiego nagrania (wiersz / fragment prozy / krótka etiuda aktorska),
* aktualnego zdjęcia.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres e-mail:
**[ravendumpling01@gmail.com](mailto:ravendumpling01@gmail.com)**

items.summary:
# Join us for The Funny Life Film Festival 2026 - 20th & 21st March in North London!

Celebrating Comedy in our 4th year - we are screening 47 fabulously funny films including 9 UK Premieres; LIVE Stand-Up Comedy; Filmmaker Workshops with top industry professionals; Networking; Awards Ceremony; After-Party and MORE!!!

Full Programme and Ticket Link:

# www.thefunnylifefilmfestival.com/2026

See you there!!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.

CASTING CALL 📣 PLEASE SHARE 🎭

We are looking for 3 male actors to star in our new upcoming show “A Curtain Calls” at the Epstein theatre in Liverpool city centre in July 2026. Please note we are based in Liverpool, Merseyside so our rehearsals will be taking place in the city centre and it is a PAID PROFIT SHARE production. If any of these characters capture your attention then give us a shout we would love to hear from you ! 🎭 you must be 18+ to apply . For all enquires/ Audition material, please email our admin team at Glassdoorproductions.19@gmail.com ⭐️💫

items.text:
If you loved KENREX or Cruise, then next week come to The Show People Podcast LIVE at The Two Brewers in Clapham with special guest: Jack Holden.

We’ll be exploring his life and career as an actor, writer and storyteller, and the lessons he’s learned along the way, from the fringe, to the West End and now... Broadway.

It’s an intimate live recording, with only 100 seats available and all profits support LGBTQIA+ theatre projects.

🗓️ Wednesday 11th March 2026 | 7:30pm - 10pm
📍 The Two Brewers, 114 Clapham High Street, London SW4 7UJ

Tickets available via the Queer Theatre website

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 10/2026

LEBENSECHTE ROBOTERTIERE UND DER INTERNATIONALE FRAUENTAG

Der neueste Pixar Streifen lässt menschliches Bewusstsein in tierische Roboterwesen einpflanzen. In wie weit der neueste Animationsfilm ein Hit werden könnte, verrät Ihnen Sarah Fuchs.

Christian Bale reist als Frankenstein in die 1930er Jahre, um eine Frau zu finden. THE BRIDE entpuppt sich allerdings als Fehlexperiment, die tödliche Spuren hinterlässt.

Zum Frauentag 2026 starten zwei ganz besondere Filme inkl. Interviews mit Adrian Goiginger sowie Axel Stasny (VIER MINUS DREI, EIN LEBEN IN FARBE).

Musikalisch erinnern wir an die kürzlich verstorbene Hollywood Legende Robert Duvall.

Mittwoch 4.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Fotocredit Robert Duvall: David Shankbone

items.text:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

items.text:
# Testkunden gesucht - Kostenlose Website 

Hallo, ich möchte mich kurz Vorstellen. Mein Name ist Emanuel und ich bin seit einigen Jahren in der Software Entwicklung aktiv.

Vor kurzen habe ich mich dann selbstständig gemacht und biete aktuell eine Website Erstellung komplett kostenlos an, um Referenzen zu finden. 

Dafür kümmere ich mich zudem jedoch auch um SEO Optimierung Domain etc.

Solltest du also schonmal darüber nachgedacht haben deine Online Präsenz zu verbessern, biete ich dir die perfekte Möglichkeit dies kostenlos zu tun.

Weitere Software

Zudem biete ich auch andere Software Lösungen an. Da ich auch hier nach Referenzen suche, sind diese sehr kostengünstig. Beispielsweise Organisationstools, Tools zu Online Reservierungen, oder Online Vereinbarung von Terminen u.ä.

Klingt das für dich spannend? Schick gerne eine PN

items.text:
Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

Ledig, mandlig statistrolle, alder ca. 30 - 45 år, som funktionær. 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdage
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland.

Der er kostume/sminkeprøve i Agger på tirsdag d. 10. marts et aftalt tidspunkt ml. 14-19.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. 
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne sætte sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

items.title: Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

sharedPost.text:
Hej alle😊

Jeg er 22 år og kommer fra Viborg. 
Min største drøm er at blive skuespiller, og jeg vil virkelig gerne udvikle mig mere. Jeg har været statist i spillefilm, kortfilm og reklamer/kampagner og er klar på at lære endnu mere  foran kameraet.

Jeg er samarbejdsvillig, imødekommende, meget lære nem og mødestabil. ￼￼￼

Kender I til auditions, projekter eller workshops, så må I meget gerne sige til 🙌

Hvis i er interesseret, må i meget gerne skrive til mig på Messenger.￼

Tak på forhånd 
Mvh Maja

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of one or more people and blonde hair

topComments.text: Hej Maja. Jeg er også fra Viborg. Prøv at kontakte Medieskolen i Viborg. Deres elever producerer mange kortfilm hvert år, og de bruger skuespillere udefra. Det er selvfølgelig ulønnet, men det er noget af den bedste erfaring, du kan få som skuespiller. Jeg ligger selv i deres "kartotek" og laver af og til film med deres elever.

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – Professional Female Dancers for Cairo & North Coast, Egypt 2026! ✨
Looking For:

•  Professional female dancers only

•  Strong experience in live performances & shows

•  Versatile in multiple styles: Go-Go, Show Dance, Commercial, Fusion, Jazz, Contemporary, Belly (or any that fit club/restaurant/stage vibes)

•  Powerful stage presence, high energy, and excellent teamwork

•  Big Plus: 🔥 Fire Show | 🤸‍♀️ Acrobatics | 🎪 Aerial (Silks/Pole/Hoop) | 🎤 Singing/Vocals | Any unique/special acts!

📏 Preferred Height: 165–170 cm (but talent & skills come first!)

What We Offer:

•  Competitive monthly salary: $900 (or equivalent in EGP, negotiable based on experience)

•  Comfortable shared accommodation (2 per room)

•  2 meals per day provided

•  Schedule: 5 working days + 2 days off (Sundays & Mondays off)

•  Max 5 hours per day 

•  Long-term opportunities in Cairo (year-round) & North Coast (summer season peaks)

Start date: From mid-February 2026 

Join our growing team for an exciting 2026 season!

📩 Apply Now via Dm:

•  Full Name + Nationality + Age

•  Height (cm) + Weight (kg)

•  Contact (WhatsApp/Telegram number)

•  Extra Skills (Fire / Acro / Aerial / Singing / Other)

•  Media (VERY IMPORTANT!): 

• Recent full-body photos (stage, performance, casual) • Short promo video / showreel 

• Instagram username

•  CV / Resume

•  Availability: Can you start from 15 February 2026? If not, when?

Serious professional dancers only – No upfront fees! Shortlisted candidates will receive full details & contract info.

Tag a talented dancer who fits! 💃🔥

#DancersWanted #CairoDancers #NorthCoastEgypt #DanceJobsEgypt #FemaleDancers #GoGoDancer #HospitalityEntertainment #EgyptCasting #Hiring2026 #NightlifeCairo

items.text:
⭐️EVC Talent Casting Show 2026⭐️

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 geht in ihre 5. Ausgabe und wir suchen außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Ob große Showmomente, bewegende Stimmen oder spektakuläre Performances wir geben Künstlerinnen und Künstlern eine Plattform, ihr Talent vor Jury und Publikum zu präsentieren.

🎭 Wer kann sich bewerben?

Wir öffnen unsere Bühne für:

• Musikerinnen & Musiker (Solo)

• Bands & Musikprojekte

• Tänzer & Tänzerinnen (Solo, Duo oder Crew)

• Artistinnen & Artisten (Akrobatik, Show, Performance)

• Comedians & Entertainer

• Tierische Talente mit besonderen Kunststücken

✨ Dabei gilt unser Motto 2026:

„Dein Talent kennt keine Grenzen“

Bei uns zählt nicht Herkunft, Stilrichtung oder Genre sondern Leidenschaft, Mut und Ausdruck.

Jede Bewerbung wird fair gesichtet. Jeder Act bekommt die gleiche Chance.

🎬 Die Jury-Castings starten im Frühjahr und Sommer 2026.

Dort entscheidet sich, wer es in die große Show schafft.

📌 Jetzt bewerben:

https://electricvisionscleve.de/forms/talent_casting.php

📩 Optional kannst du Fotos oder Vorschau-Videos senden an: electricvisions@gmx.de

Warte nicht auf den perfekten Moment mach ihn perfekt.

Wir freuen uns auf deine oder eure Bewerbung!

#EVCTalentCasting #TalentShow2026 #Jubiläumsstaffel #DeinTalentKenntKeineGrenzen

items.summary:
⭐️EVC Talent Casting Show 2026⭐️

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 geht in ihre 5. Ausgabe und wir suchen außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Ob große Showmomente, bewegende Stimmen oder spektakuläre Performances wir geben Künstlerinnen und Künstlern eine Plattform, ihr Talent vor Jury und Publikum zu präsentieren.

🎭 Wer kann sich bewerben?

Wir öffnen unsere Bühne für:

• Musikerinnen & Musiker (Solo)

• Bands & Musikprojekte

• Tänzer & Tänzerinnen (Solo, Duo oder Crew)

• Artistinnen & Artisten (Akrobatik, Show, Performance)

• Comedians & Entertainer

• Tierische Talente mit besonderen Kunststücken

✨ Dabei gilt unser Motto 2026:

„Dein Talent kennt keine Grenzen“

Bei uns zählt nicht Herkunft, Stilrichtung oder Genre sondern Leidenschaft, Mut und Ausdruck.

Jede Bewerbung wird fair gesichtet. Jeder Act bekommt die gleiche Chance.

🎬 Die Jury-Castings starten im Frühjahr und Sommer 2026.

Dort entscheidet sich, wer es in die große Show schafft.

📌 Jetzt bewerben:

https://electricvisionscleve.de/forms/talent_casting.php

📩 Optional kannst du Fotos oder Vorschau-Videos senden an: electricvisions@gmx.de

Warte nicht auf den perfekten Moment mach ihn perfekt.

Wir freuen uns auf deine oder eure Bewerbung!

#EVCTalentCasting #TalentShow2026 #Jubiläumsstaffel #DeinTalentKenntKeineGrenzen

items.text:
Jeg kan ikke holde op med at lave sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem sammen! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser har du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig

MATTHEW WHEELER Need an early 20s male enthusiastic with strong emotional range Matthew is an office worker who gets arrested for a crime he doesn't know he's committed Contact Information If you are interested in this role, please contact our producer with your resume: reevesc25@kendal.ac.uk or our director harrisonheo2009@outlok.com harrisontheo2 2009@ Deadline: 01/04/26 Shooting date: 20/04/26 We will cover travel and food expenses Located in Kendal'

topComments.text:
Genre : comedy, drama 

Based in : UK 

Recorded in : the Wirral 
Filming locations : Wirral 
Filming date : April/may - ongoing 

Premise : an unlikely group of friends from a multitude of backgrounds including highschool drop outs, educated college students, and even a low time drug dealer. Set between 2000s and 2015, this series shows friendship is messy and chaotic, pulling no punches, this group is unpredictable and at times emotional, but always "real". 

Tone : nostalgic, friendly, comedic, 

Characters : 

.Izzy pastel - smart student with a down to earth personality, attends college, always having banter with the lads and able to keep up, mental sparring is her Forte. [ Free ] 

.Jamie "ash" carter - rough around the edges but lovable, college drop out ( kick out), enjoys art, joking, and smoking. 
[ Taken ] 

.Ryan carter - older brother to Jamie. Shy, calm, and reserved, doesn't talk much but when he does it's comedy gold. 
[ Free ] 

.Eddie sharp - close friends with the carter brothers, they all went to school together, consistently unemployed, low time drug dealer. 
[ Taken ] 

.Callum nightly - loves being the centre of attention, close friendship with Eddie due to consist drug use. Can sometimes be erratic. 
[ Free ] 

. Sophie frost - blonde, chaotic, extreme drug user, loves raves festivals and flirting, the group help her slow down from her fast paced lifestyle. 
[ Free ] 

.Ethan shroud - althletic rugby player, trains week days, parties weekends, knows his limits and dosnt take things too far, slightly better off than the rest of the group but always shares the wealth. 
[ Free ] 

Simon Skinner "psycho si" - local bully, always taking stuff from the group, hates everyone, hated by everyone. Loose cannon, can switch mood in an instance.
[ Free ] 

EXTRAS : 
all extra positions available 

Production crew : 
Director
Sound engineer
Editer 

Pay and travel : possible compensation | travel covered | 

Credits : full credits with legal or chosen name 

Character wardrobes : 

.Jamie "ash" carter - button up shirts, patterns, jeans, denim jackets, caps,

.Ryan carter - hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Izzy pastel - jumpers, skirts, jeans, hoodies, 

.Eddie sharp - tracksuits, beanies, trainers, 

.Ethan shroud - jumpers, sports jerseys, jeans, boots,

.Callum nightly - windbreakers, tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Evie Owens - shirts, jeans, leopard prints 

.Simon Skinner "psycho Simon" - tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, caps, Burberry 

NOTE : MUST BE COMFORTABLE SMOKING EFFECT CIGARETTES
Season 1 confirmed? With whom? If it's confirmed why is it unpaid?

This is an unpaid acting opportunity that takes approx. 5 mins.

We will credit you and you can use the experience on your resume as being in an advert. 

There is no travel, as long as you have a good quality set up and can record yourself saying a few words approx. 10-20 secs and send to us. 

Email hi@coconutspaces.com and I will send you a script. You record in your own time and send back. After editing we will send the entire advert to you to add to your portfolio. 

Seeking all ages 18-99 all sexes and genders All races - everyone welcome! 

Much Love, 

www.coconutspaces.com

# **CASTING CALL!!** - *BRISTOL* 
# SHORT STUDENT FILM - 'THE LOCK INN'
# LOOKING FOR 3 SUPPORTING MALE ROLES.

FILM SUMMARY: A savvy bartender and her layabout coworkers must prevent the spread of a zombie-like virus outbreak in their small town, which turns their rude, ungrateful regulars into deadly, flesh-hungry crawlers. Can she find a way to survive with her fellow bar staff, or die in a dead-end job?

SHOOTING DATES: 23rd - 27th March.

Owing to this being a low-budget student production, we will offer an honorarium of £50 and cover all travel and food expenses for the shoots.

NOTE: This short may also be submitted to festivals or published on social media. All roles listed will require “zombie-fied” makeup, performed by our makeup artist. This will be minor and non-invasive.

# If interested: Please email [Gwen.Willcox@boomsatsuma.education](mailto:Gwen.Willcox@boomsatsuma.education) 
# To send through a headshot/showreel. 

# DEADLINE: 8PM - 12TH MARCH 2026

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text
May be an image of text

May be a graphic of text that says 'THE LOCK INN- FEMALE ZOMBIESHORT CASTING CALL: AaRON LOOKING FOR 20-25 Y/O MALE ABLE TO FILM IN FILTON/ BRISTOL FROM THE 23RD 27TH OF MARCH! the Social Club being the owner nephew, and described as the 'personality hire' by the regulars. kind of guy at work you love ingoutwith, but hate working with. asy-going, and always acting for lf,rather than acting for the needs the group. On the night of a zombie virus outbreak, it's down to Aaron to prove his resourcefulness to his co-workers, or die trying. Interested? Scan this QR Code to be directed to the application!'

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.
